operation: CORE LORE cascade pulse — expanding ring waves on searching state
learnings: For horizontal rings: rotation=[Pi/2,0,0] + scale.set(r,r,1) expands correctly in world XZ plane. Local X→World X, Local Y→World -Z after rotation.
depthWrite:false is critical for overlapping transparent rings — prevents z-fighting artifacts.
useKingdomStore.getState() inside useFrame: correct pattern for reading store without subscription. No re-renders, just current value per frame.
Pre-allocated mesh pool + wave state refs = zero GC pressure. Inactive meshes scale to 0 (invisible, not unmounted).
steps_completed: CoreLoreCascade component written (pool of 4 waves, useFrame-driven, zero allocation)
art_gate_result: PASS — knowledge radiating outward. Hairline rings at emissiveIntensity 2.2 blaze under bloom then fade at horizon. Different from every other territory.
architectural_plaque: CoreLoreCascade: pre-allocated pool of 4 wave entries + mesh refs. useFrame reads agentStates via getState(). Rotation [Pi/2,0,0] + scale.set(r,r,1) = horizontal XZ plane expansion. depthWrite false prevents overlap artifacts.
